edits.request: 把 Terminus2 的 tmux 默认窗格尺寸调大：将 __init__ 中的 tmux_pane_width 默认值从 160 改为 200、tmux_pane_height 从 40 改为 50，并同步更新对应的文档字符串说明，让宽表格类命令输出更不容易换行。

Make the terminal-output truncation limit configurable: add a `max_output_bytes` parameter to Terminus2.__init__ (default 10000), store it on the instance, and have _limit_output_length use it instead of the hard-coded 10000 default.
Rename the _summarization_count counter to _summary_round_count throughout the Terminus2 class, updating all sites that initialize, reset, increment, or read it.
Add a one-line docstring to the top of the main entry function explaining what it does.
